executives.name: Nolan Watson
executives.background: Mr. Watson is the President and CEO of Sandstorm. He was the first employee of Silver Wheaton Corp. (now Wheaton Precious Metals Corp.) where he served as CFO. He is a Chartered Professional Accountant (BC), a Chartered Financial Analyst charterholder, and holds a Bachelor of Commerce degree.

tenure_dates.title: President, Chief Executive Officer and Director

executives.name: Erfan Kazemi
executives.background: Mr. Kazemi is the Chief Financial Officer of Sandstorm. Prior to joining Sandstorm, he was a Senior Manager at PricewaterhouseCoopers LLP. He is a Chartered Professional Accountant (BC), a Chartered Financial Analyst charterholder, and holds a Bachelor of Science degree.

executives.name: David Awram
executives.background: Mr. Awram is a co-founder of Sandstorm. Previously, he was the Director of Investor Relations for Silver Wheaton Corp. He holds a Bachelor of Science degree in Geology.

board_of_directors.name: Nolan Watson
board_of_directors.background: President and CEO of Sandstorm Gold Ltd.

board_of_directors.name: David Awram
board_of_directors.background: Senior Vice President of Sandstorm Gold Ltd.

board_of_directors.name: John Budreski
board_of_directors.background: Executive Chairman of EnWave Corporation and former Managing Director and Head of Investment Banking for Cormark Securities Inc.

board_of_directors.name: David De Witt
board_of_directors.background: Chairman of Pathway Capital Ltd. and a director of several public companies.

board_of_directors.name: Andrew Swarthout
board_of_directors.background: Former CEO and Executive Chairman of Bear Creek Mining Corporation.

board_of_directors.name: Mary Little
board_of_directors.background: Geologist with over 30 years of experience in the mining industry, including positions with WMC, Newmont, and Cyprus Amax.

board_of_directors.name: Vera Kobalia
board_of_directors.background: Founder of Olyn and former Minister of Economy and Sustainable Development for the Republic of Georgia.
